Peaky Blinders.description: The Peaky Blinders were a street gang based in Birmingham, England, operating from the 1880s until the 1920s. They engaged in robbery, violence, racketeering, illegal bookmaking, and gambling control. The gang was known for their distinctive attire and held dominance in Birmingham until being overtaken by the Birmingham Boys in 1920.

descriptions: The Birmingham Boys overtook the Peaky Blinders in 1920.
edges.evidence_quote: They held "control" for 30 years until 1920, when a larger gang, the Birmingham Boys, led by Billy Kimber, overtook them.

descriptions: Peaky Blinders fought the Sloggers for territory in Birmingham.
edges.evidence_quote: The Blinders' dominance came about from beating rivals, including the "Sloggers", "a pugilistic term for someone who could strike a heavy blow in the ring", whom they fought for territory in Birmingham and its surrounding districts.

descriptions: Lab 110 is a parent organization of Lazarus Group.
edges.evidence_quote: Parent organization: Lab 110 and Bureau 121

descriptions: The two clans were in a feud.
edges.evidence_quote: scaturita dalla faida tra i clan D'Agostino-Panella e Grimaldi di Salerno

edges.evidence_quote: Altre famiglie coinvolte nell'ampia alleanza anticutoliana furono ... i Grimaldi di Salerno

edges.evidence_quote: Between 2001 and 2003, La Raza was involved in a gang war with Vatos Locos

descriptions: Birger and the Shelton Brothers Gang fought a war over bootlegging control.
edges.evidence_quote: By October 1926, the Birger and Shelton Gangs were in open conflict.

descriptions: Birger initially allied with the Shelton Brothers Gang to bootleg alcohol.
edges.evidence_quote: in 1920 he joined forces with the Shelton Brothers.

descriptions: The Shelton Brothers Gang and Charles Birger's gang were at war.
edges.evidence_quote: The Shelton Brothers Gang engaged in a war with Charles Birger 's gang that concluded, in 1925, when the Shelton Brothers were convicted of the murder of a mail carrier.

descriptions: The Shelton Brothers Gang and Charles Birger gang fought against the Ku Klux Klan.
edges.evidence_quote: The Shelton Brothers Gang and rival Charles Birger gang engaged in a war with the Ku Klux Klan that concluded with a shoot out at Herrin.

Mara Salvatrucha.description: International criminal gang originating in Los Angeles, California in the 1980s, initially formed to protect Salvadoran immigrants. It expanded through deportations to Central America and is active in the US, Canada, Mexico, and Central America. Engages in drug trafficking, murder, extortion, and other crimes. Designated as a terrorist organization by the US, Canada, and El Salvador.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sapp Boys, MS-13 , and Hells Angels

descriptions: Ñetas members killed MS-13 members, indicating conflict.

descriptions: Ñetas members killed MS-13 members.
edges.evidence_quote: siete líderes de la Asociación Ñeta fueron arrestados en Long Island, Nueva York, por el apuñalamiento y asesinato de dos miembros de la MS-13.

descriptions: The Brotherhood of Eternal Love was formed by members of the Street Sweepers gang, who reincorporated as the new organization.
edges.evidence_quote: In the mid-1960s, John Griggs and others were members of a car gang called the Street Sweepers in Anaheim, California. ... he and the other Street Sweepers became psychedelic evangelists and reincorporated themselves as the Brotherhood of Eternal Love.

descriptions: Năm Cam worked in Bảy Sy's casino, assisting in its operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Later, Bảy Sy was released and soon opened a casino, where Năm Cam and Nguyễn Văn Nhã helped out to run the casino.

descriptions: Năm Cam's organization and Dung Hà's gang were in a gang feud, with conflict and confrontations.
edges.evidence_quote: His downfall however came during a gang feud with another notorious female gangster from the northern port city of Haiphong , Dung Hà who was considered one of the two great powers of the Vietnamese underworld alongside Năm Cam.

descriptions: Năm Cam ordered the assassination of Dung Hà after a feud between their gangs.
edges.evidence_quote: On October 2, 2000, Dung Hà was assassinated under orders from Năm Cam, who had previously been in a feud with Dung Hà in Saigon.

descriptions: Huỳnh Tỳ's triad initiated Năm Cam into the criminal underworld.
edges.evidence_quote: Văn Cam was first initiated into the criminal underworld by Huỳnh Tỳ, a major player in the triads of Saigon at the time.

descriptions: Hải Bánh joined forces with Năm Cam's gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Knowing of Hải "Bánh", a mobster from the north who migrated to the south to join forces with Năm Cam's and became incredibly wealthy in the process

descriptions: Năm Cam's organization planned to kill Tài chém, leading to conflict with his gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Năm Cam, under the guidance of Bảy Sy planned to kill Tài chém, a notorious gangster in the first district of Saigon, but the plan failed and resulted in Năm Cam being chased by Tài chém's gang brothers.

descriptions: Năm Cam was a follower and member of Đại Cathay's mob, learning from him.
edges.evidence_quote: During his early years as a youth in Saigon, Năm Cam was a follower of the most infamous mob leader in Saigon during the 60s, Đại Cathay

descriptions: The Supreme White Alliance assisted the IKA with hate rock gatherings until breaking ties after Edwards' arrest.
edges.evidence_quote: the Supreme White Alliance, a white power skinhead group that had been assisting the IKA with annual hate rock gatherings, decided to break ties with the IKA after Edwards' arrest.

Kudo-kai.description: The Kudo-kai is a yakuza group headquartered in Kitakyushu, Fukuoka, Japan, founded before WWII as a bakuto organization named Kudo-gumi by Genji Kudo. It is the largest yakuza group in the Kitakyushu area, known for its militant stance and conflicts with the Yamaguchi-gumi. The group has been designated as a particularly nefarious organization by the National Police Agency and was registered under the Organized Crime Countermeasures Law in 1992.

descriptions: Dojin-kai is allied with Kudo-kai as per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Kudo-kai, Sinaloa cartel, Taishu-kai, Kumamoto-kai)

descriptions: Fukuhaku-kai has been in conflict with Kudo-kai over attempts to enter Nakasu territory.
edges.evidence_quote: The Fukuhaku-kai has been in conflict with four different Yamaguchi-affiliates over the concessions of Nakasu , the largest red-light district in Kyushu, and also with the Dojin-kai and Kudo-kai over their attempts to enter the same territory.

descriptions: Kudo-kai and Dojin-kai are both members of the Yonsha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kudo-kai is a member of an anti-Yamaguchi fraternal federation, the Yonsha-kai, with three other northern-Kyushu based organizations, the Taishu-kai , Dojin-kai , and Kumamoto-kai.

descriptions: Kudo-kai and Kumamoto-kai are both members of the Yonsha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kudo-kai is a member of an anti-Yamaguchi fraternal federation, the Yonsha-kai, with three other northern-Kyushu based organizations, the Taishu-kai , Dojin-kai , and Kumamoto-kai.

descriptions: Kudo-kai annexed Kusano-ikka after prior conflicts.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1987, the Kudo-kai annexed the Kusano-ikka, a Kitakyushu-based yakuza clan which had frequent violent conflicts with the Kudo-kai until then.

descriptions: Kudo-kai and Taishu-kai are both members of the Yonsha-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kudo-kai is a member of an anti-Yamaguchi fraternal federation, the Yonsha-kai, with three other northern-Kyushu based organizations, the Taishu-kai , Dojin-kai , and Kumamoto-kai.

descriptions: Kudo-kai is a designated yakuza group, a subset of Yakuza.
edges.evidence_quote: Fukuoka Prefecture has the largest number of designated yakuza groups among all of the prefectures, at 5; the Kudo-kai, the Taishu-kai, the Fukuhaku-kai, the Dojin-kai, and the Namikawa-kai.

descriptions: Kudo-kai has been in conflict with Yamaguchi-gumi, including killings of Yamaguchi-affiliate bosses.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kudo-kai has been an independent syndicate since its foundation, and has caused numerous conflicts with the Yamaguchi-gumi , for example on eight occasions in 2000 at least one Yamaguchi-affiliate boss has been killed by the Kudo-kai.

descriptions: Kudo-kai is part of a federation that opposes the Yamaguchi-gumi, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The Taishu-kai is a member of an anti-Yamaguchi-gumi fraternal federation, the "Yonsha-kai", along with the Kitakyushu -based Kudo-kai

descriptions: Taishu-kai and Kudo-kai are both members of the Yonsha-kai federation, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Taishu-kai is a member of an anti-Yamaguchi-gumi fraternal federation, the "Yonsha-kai", along with the Kitakyushu -based Kudo-kai , the Kurume -based Dojin-kai and the Kumamoto -based Kumamoto-kai.

descriptions: Kudo-kai is a leading member of an anti-Yamaguchi federation, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kudo-kai was a Kyushu-based independent syndicate known as the leading member of an anti-Yamaguchi federation

descriptions: Ah Kong was founded by former See Tong members and initially operated under the See Tong flag.
edges.evidence_quote: Roland Tan and his brethren... founded Ah Kong but operated under the See Tong flag.

descriptions: Ang Soon Tong clashed with See Tong over a funeral banner.
edges.evidence_quote: In December 1995, Ang Soon Tong clashed with a rival gang, See Tong, over a funeral banner.

descriptions: See Tong attacked members of rival gang Pek Kim Leng, resulting in a death.
edges.evidence_quote: Roland Tan... and about ten of his fellow gang members from See Tong had armed themselves with machetes to attack two members of their rival gang, Pek Kim Leng

descriptions: The Bonanno family delivered a corpse to the DeMeo crew for disposal.
edges.evidence_quote: Bonanno family underboss Salvatore Vitale claimed to the Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) that in 1974 he was ordered to deliver the corpse of a man who had just been murdered to a garage in Queens so that it could be disposed of by DeMeo.

descriptions: The DeMeo crew operated under the Gambino crime family, with DeMeo as a made member.
edges.evidence_quote: Roy Albert DeMeo ... was an American mobster in the Gambino crime family of New York City. He headed a group known as the 'DeMeo crew'.

descriptions: The DeMeo crew was a subunit of the Gambino crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: Roy Albert DeMeo was an American mobster in the Gambino crime family of New York City. He headed a group known as the "DeMeo crew"

descriptions: DeMeo was initially associated with the Lucchese family before shifting allegiance.
edges.evidence_quote: DeMeo was initially an associate of the Brooklyn faction of the Lucchese crime family

descriptions: Lucchese family underboss Casso ordered DeMeo crew members to kill DeMeo and promised them membership in the Lucchese family.
edges.evidence_quote: Casso ordered them to kill DeMeo, assuring them that there would be no retribution and that afterwards they would join him in the Lucchese family.

descriptions: DeMeo formed an alliance with the Westies, which helped him become a made member.
edges.evidence_quote: DeMeo secured his induction into the Gambino family by forming an alliance with an Irish-American gang known as the Westies

descriptions: F-side lists Lighttown Madness as rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Lighttown Madness

descriptions: The two factions were in conflict during the third Colombo family war.
edges.evidence_quote: The Colombo crime family divided into two factions during the third family war (1991 to 1993).

descriptions: EPB worked in conjunction with FALN in 1979.
edges.evidence_quote: In September 1979, the EPB revealed that it was working in conjunction with the Volunteers, FARP and FALN.

descriptions: FARC was allied with FALN until 1969.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: FALN (until 1969)

descriptions: Moraine MC was allied with Chosen Ones MC in the shootout with Cannonball.
edges.evidence_quote: Four members of the Chosen Ones and the allied Moraine MC were also charged in the case.

descriptions: Moraine MC was allied with Chosen Ones MC.
edges.evidence_quote: Four members of the Chosen Ones and the allied Moraine MC were also charged in the case.

descriptions: Easton Crew patched over to become a Bacchus chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: In January 2011, the Easton Crew based in Grand Falls 'patched over' to become the first Bacchus chapter in Newfoundland.

descriptions: The PKK lists the Kurdistan Free Life Party as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Kurdistan Free Life Party

descriptions: The Kerryonians fought the Pelters.
edges.evidence_quote: The Kerryonians also fought a gang named the " Pelters ".

descriptions: Aquino-Annunziata are historical allies of the Matrone.
edges.evidence_quote: contratto con gli Aquino-Annunziata di Boscoreale , storici alleati dei Matrone
